overall_assessment: The paper is exceptionally well-grounded in the provided code and logs. It accurately reports the methodology, metrics, and results for the experiments that were successfully completed (H-E1, H-M1, H-M2). All reported numbers match the output JSON files perfectly. Furthermore, the paper transparently and correctly states that the downstream fine-tuning experiments (H-M3, H-M4) were not executed/completed, which aligns with the Out-Of-Memory (OOM) error seen in the H-M3 logs. The paper also explicitly flags an unverified citation as a limitation. No hallucinations were found.
